renderBlockingErrors: [html-infrastructure] [MAIN-AGENT] product-detail.html missing Tailwind CSS CDN (<script src="...@tailwindcss/browser@4">). Impact: all utility classes stop working; page degrades to unstyled HTML. Fix: run fill-html-head.mjs <css-path> product-detail.html --replace-head

[html-infrastructure] [MAIN-AGENT] product-detail.html missing <style id="theme-vars"> theme CSS variable block. Impact: all semantic token colors degrade to transparent/default values. Fix: run fill-html-head.mjs <css-path> product-detail.html --replace-head

[html-infrastructure] [MAIN-AGENT] product-detail.html missing @theme inline Tailwind <-> CSS variable bridge block. Impact: bg-primary, text-foreground and similar classes cannot map to theme colors. Fix: run fill-html-head.mjs <css-path> product-detail.html --replace-head

[html-infrastructure] [MAIN-AGENT] product-detail.html missing @layer base global base styles. Impact: body background color, font, table word-break and other base styles are lost. Fix: run fill-html-head.mjs <css-path> product-detail.html --replace-head

[html-infrastructure] [MAIN-AGENT] product-detail.html missing <html class="light"> or <html class="dark"> theme mode selector. Impact: CSS variable selectors do not match; all theme colors stop working. Fix: run fill-html-head.mjs <css-path> product-detail.html --replace-head
[html-quality] product-detail.html: brand CSS must be inlined by fill-html-head.mjs; do not use <link rel="stylesheet"> for colors_and_type.css
